name: provenance entry from pr-corpus learning carries the class field set to pr-corpus literal value
command: printf '{"class":"pr-corpus","supporting_prs":[],"evidence_count":0,"organizations_count":0}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-provenance.sh" --provenance prov.json --check-class 2>out.txt && grep -q 'class=pr-corpus' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
